series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of documents related to ODOT Bond financing files relating to the sale of bonds, including accounting records of the timing and allocation of expenditures (e.g., vouchers). Includes--bond issuance documents, project spenddowns, debt service schedules/invoices, federal authorization and PS&E bid documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 3 Years After Final Maturity is Matured, Retired or Defeased ; Electronic: 3 Years After Final Maturity is Matured, Retired or Defeased., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
